pool.text: Well, I reckon a day starts early, before sunup. I’d be up inspecting the fields, making sure the crops are doing well and the slaves are on task. I’d have a breakfast of cornbread and coffee, maybe a bit of bacon. The day’s work would involve overseeing the laborers, checking the harvest, and keeping an eye on the overseers. By evening, I’d be back at the house, maybe reading or taking a walk, thinking about the profits and the next season’s plans. Yeah, life’s all about keeping things running smooth and making sure the money rolls in.
